entities.name: LINSEED
entities.description: A versatile crop used in industrial, culinary, feed, and nutraceutical sectors, also known as flax.

entities.name: PRODUCTION YIELD
entities.description: The quantitative output of the linseed crop, which is the target for enhancement through metabolic engineering.

entities.name: METABOLIC ENGINEERING
entities.description: The application of techniques to manipulate biosynthetic pathways to enhance production yields and product quality.

entities.name: GENE OVEREXPRESSION
entities.description: A metabolic engineering strategy involving the increased expression of a gene to boost product yield.

entities.name: KNOCKOUT
entities.description: A metabolic engineering strategy involving the inactivation of a gene to alter metabolic pathways.

entities.name: PATHWAY OPTIMIZATION
entities.description: A metabolic engineering strategy aimed at improving the efficiency of biosynthetic pathways.

entities.name: OMICS TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: A collective term for high-throughput technologies like genomics, transcriptomics, and metabolomics used to study biological systems.

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the complete set of DNA within an organism, used to understand regulatory mechanisms in linseed.

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOMICS
entities.description: The study of the transcriptome, used to understand regulatory mechanisms in linseed.

entities.name: METABOLOMICS
entities.description: The study of small molecule metabolites, used to understand regulatory mechanisms in linseed.

entities.name: SYNTHETIC BIOLOGY
entities.description: The design and construction of new biological parts and systems to fine-tune linseed metabolism.

entities.name: GENOME EDITING
entities.description: Techniques used to make precise changes to the DNA sequence to fine-tune linseed metabolism.

entities.name: OIL CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of oil produced by the linseed crop, targeted for improvement via metabolic engineering.

entities.name: FATTY ACID COMPOSITION
entities.description: The specific makeup of fatty acids in linseed oil, targeted for modification via metabolic engineering.

entities.name: SECONDARY METABOLITES
entities.description: Bioactive compounds produced by the crop, such as lignans, whose synthesis is governed by metabolic pathways.

entities.name: METABOLIC PATHWAYS
entities.description: The series of chemical reactions within a cell that synthesize primary and secondary metabolites.

entities.name: GENES
entities.description: The fundamental units of heredity that govern the metabolic pathways responsible for oil, fibers, and yield.
